sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10341" key="a)ntiperipoihtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιπερι-ποιητικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n10341.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">expressive of a claim, An.Bachm.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0082.tlg004:2:291" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.291</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
